def calculate_tax(order):
    # Violation: condition tree nests past two business decision levels (arrow code)
    if order.is_active:
        if order.customer.is_premium:
            if order.amount > 1000:
                return order.amount * 0.05
            else:
                return order.amount * 0.08
        else:
            return order.amount * 0.1
    return 0
